Prop Firm Compliance Schedule (365-Day Outlook)  
All times are in Eastern Time (ET). Ensure your platform clock is synchronized.

\*2027 specific dates for CPI/GDP/NFP are based on standard recurring patterns. Check the [Bureau of Labor Statistics](https://www.bls.gov/schedule/news_release/empsit.htm) in late 2026 for the finalized 2027 calendar.   
![Bureau of Labor Statistics (.gov)][image1]  
Bureau of Labor Statistics (.gov) \+2  
Critical Reminders:

* The 60-Minute FOMC Rule: By exiting at 1:55 PM and staying flat until 2:40 PM (5 minutes after the press conference typically ends), you avoid both the initial rate volatility and the subsequent market swings during the Q\&A session.  
* Time Changes: The table accounts for the standard 8:30 AM and 2:00 PM release times. If you trade from a different timezone, use a Time Zone Converter to ensure your exit aligns with Eastern Time.

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
